pi_items.source: Task specification - verified path is a valid Linux absolute path
Task specification - verified path is a valid Linux absolute path

privileged_info_summary: No verified privileged information available. The metadata contains only task specification parameters (file paths) where the agent should create outputs. The task uses synthetic test data created by the setup_task.sh script, not external data sources. Aerobridge is a real, open-source Django-based UAV management system (GitHub: openutm-labs/aerobridge). The task creates four test FlightPlan records with varying time and status combinations to verify the agent correctly identifies and cancels only past-scheduled flights with 'Planned' status while preserving completed and future flights.
